name: Justice Surya Kant
designation: Senior Judge, Supreme Court of India
bio: Justice Surya Kant is one of the senior-most judges of the Supreme Court of India. Prior to his elevation, he served as the Chief Justice of the Himachal Pradesh High Court and as a judge of the Punjab and Haryana High Court. He is known for his expertise in constitutional law, criminal law, and service matters. Justice Surya Kant has been part of several Constitution Benches and is known for his plain-spoken judgments and concern for access to justice.
